definitions: 级联的；连锁蔓延的（如故障、失败等一个接一个扩散）

examples.text: The first thing you'd do is shut off the main valve to prevent further damage. The Circuit Breaker pattern works similarly, preventing cascading failures in distributed systems. When a service becomes unavailable, the Circuit Breaker stops requests, allowing it to recover. Netflix's Hystrix library uses this pattern.
examples.explanation: 这里的 cascading failures 指“级联故障 / 连锁失败”，即一个服务出问题后，影响继续向其他服务扩散，像连锁反应一样。cascading 在这里表示“连锁蔓延的、逐级扩散的”。
